reason: Citizen Kane is a landmark drama of power and regret in early 20th-c. America.
Gone with the Wind is an epic Civil War drama set on a Georgia plantation.
Casablanca is a romantic wartime drama in a Moroccan café under Vichy rule.
Rebecca unfolds gothic mystery and marital suspense in an English manor.
Laura is a moody detective tale of obsession set in postwar New York.
Notorious blends espionage and romance in wartime suspense.
It Happened One Night is a classic screwball drama of love and pursuit.
The Third Man captures post-war Vienna’s shadows in a masterful thriller.
The Maltese Falcon is a hard-boiled detective drama of greed and murder.
The 39 Steps is a taut Hitchcock thriller of espionage before WWII.
